occupation: CEO at Goldbach Neo OOH AG
headline: CEO Goldbach Neo OOH AG
summary:
Commercially focused, experienced leader with expertise in operational finance, turnaround / restructuring, investment appraisal and cross-border M&A transaction diligence.

Collaborative, strategic thinker with leadership experience across Swiss, UK, pan-European and international companies under public, private and PE ownership structures.

Proven ability to build strong teams, deliver transformation, lead capital allocation and deal strategy, and drive sustainable profitable growth in the media, telecommunications, infrastructure and financial services industries in multilingual environments

experiences.title: Finance & Business Operations Manager: Emerging Markets - Media Networks & Distribution
Senior Finance Analyst: Disney Channels UK, Scandinavia, CEE & Emerging Markets
Analyst / Senior Finance Analyst: EMEA Regional Office Disney Channel
